headline: Credit Card Stocks Q1 Teardown: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Vs The Rest
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) and its peers.
